# GitHub Repository Metadata
# =========================
# IMPORTANT: Set these manually in GitHub Settings → General

## Description (exact - copy this)
SuperInstance: 4.2 MB single-binary AI Ranch on $499 Jetson. TensorRT-LLM Collie + Dioxus web UI + breed.md abilities. Infinite extensibility, zero bloat, honest benchmarks.

## Topics (exact - add all of these)
ai, local-ai, llm, lora, agents, rust, tensorrt-llm, crdt, jetson, dioxus, axum, modular, extensible, single-binary

## Homepage URL
https://superinstance.ai

## How to Set
1. Go to https://github.com/SuperInstance/superinstance/settings
2. In the "General" section, find "Repository name" and "Description"
3. Paste the description above
4. In "Topics", add each topic one by one (or comma-separated)
5. Click "Save changes"
